title: phaseolus coccineus subsp. formosus
intro: Phaseolus coccineus subsp. formosus, also known as scarlet runner bean, is a type of plant in the bean family that is native to Central and South America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health issues such as wounds, digestive problems, and fever. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. The herbal preparations of Phaseolus coccineus subsp. formosus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves, flowers, and seeds.
